On.Send: AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever

On.Terms: UnitDeathCustomize; IsStatus InAir 1; Option Physics High
UnitDeathCustomize; IsStatus InAir 1; Option Physics High; PassChance 50.000000

UnitDeathCustomize; IsStatus InAir 1; Option Physics Ultra

UnitDeathCustomize; IsStatus InAir 1; Option Physics High; PassChance 25.000000

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Visor Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Morph IGNORE Burrow,Superior Stand,Burrow ContentPlayOnce
AnimBracketStart Morph IGNORE Burrow,Superior Stand,Burrow ContentPlayOnce
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
